benchmark_suite: Multi-Database Yellow Taxi Analytics Stress Test
description: 20 complex SQL queries with database-specific optimizations for DuckDB, PostgreSQL, and SQLite. Each query is translated to match the target database's SQL dialect and function support.

key_translations.date_diff: DuckDB: date_diff('unit', a, b) | PostgreSQL: EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b-a))/divisor | SQLite: julianday(b)-julianday(a) * multiplier
key_translations.date_trunc: DuckDB: DATE_TRUNC('month', ts) | PostgreSQL: DATE_TRUNC('month', ts) | SQLite: DATE(ts, 'start of month')
key_translations.round_casting: DuckDB: ROUND(expr, digits) | PostgreSQL: ROUND(expr::numeric, digits) | SQLite: ROUND(expr, digits)
key_translations.extract_hour: DuckDB: EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ts) | PostgreSQL: EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ts)::integer | SQLite: CAST(strftime('%H', ts) AS INTEGER)
key_translations.percentile: DuckDB: PERCENTILE_CONT(p) WITHIN GROUP | PostgreSQL: PERCENTILE_CONT(p) WITHIN GROUP | SQLite: AVG() approximation

queries.title: Daily Revenue & Vendor Growth
queries.sql: WITH daily_metrics AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS trip_date, VendorID, COUNT(*) trip_count, SUM(total_amount) daily_revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount > 0 GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT trip_date, VendorID, trip_count, daily_revenue, ROUND((daily_revenue - LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date), 0) * 100, 2) growth_pct FROM daily_metrics ORDER BY trip_date DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: WITH daily_metrics AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_date, VendorID, COUNT(*) trip_count, SUM(total_amount) daily_revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount > 0 GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT trip_date, VendorID, trip_count, daily_revenue, ROUND(CAST((daily_revenue - LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date)) AS numeric) / CAST(NULLIF(LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date), 0) AS numeric) * 100, 2) growth_pct FROM daily_metrics ORDER BY trip_date DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: WITH daily_metrics AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_date, VendorID, COUNT(*) trip_count, SUM(total_amount) daily_revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount > 0 GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT trip_date, VendorID, trip_count, daily_revenue, ROUND((daily_revenue - LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date), 0) * 100, 2) growth_pct FROM daily_metrics ORDER BY trip_date DESC;
queries.clickhouse_sql: WITH daily_metrics AS (SELECT CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) AS trip_date, VendorID, COUNT(*) trip_count, SUM(total_amount) daily_revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount > 0 GROUP BY trip_date, VendorID) SELECT trip_date, VendorID, trip_count, daily_revenue, ROUND((daily_revenue - LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date)) / nullIf(LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date), 0) * 100, 2) growth_pct FROM daily_metrics ORDER BY trip_date DESC;
queries.pg_duckdb_sql: WITH daily_metrics AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS trip_date, VendorID, COUNT(*) trip_count, SUM(total_amount) daily_revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount > 0 GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT trip_date, VendorID, trip_count, daily_revenue, ROUND(CAST((daily_revenue - LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(daily_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY trip_date), 0) * 100 AS numeric), 2) growth_pct FROM daily_metrics ORDER BY trip_date DESC;
queries.notes: Q1: LAG window for growth. PostgreSQL needs ::numeric casting on division. pg_duckdb uses DuckDB syntax with CAST for type safety. ClickHouse: nullIf() instead of NULLIF.

queries.title: Hourly Peak Demand
queries.sql: SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_date, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) pickup_hour, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(AVG(total_amount), 2) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_date DESC, pickup_hour;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_date, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime)::integer pickup_hour, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(AVG(total_amount)::numeric, 2) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_date DESC, pickup_hour;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_date, CAST(strftime('%H', tpep_pickup_datetime) AS INTEGER) pickup_hour, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(AVG(total_amount), 2) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), strftime('%H', tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_date DESC, pickup_hour;
queries.clickhouse_sql: SELECT CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) AS trip_date, toHour(tpep_pickup_datetime) AS pickup_hour, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(AVG(total_amount), 2) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY trip_date, pickup_hour ORDER BY trip_date DESC, pickup_hour;
queries.notes: Q2: Hourly grouping. PostgreSQL: EXTRACT returns double, cast to int. SQLite: use strftime('%H'). ClickHouse: toDate() + toHour().

queries.title: Top 10 Routes by Revenue
queries.sql: SELECT PULocationID, DOLocationID, COUNT(*) freq, SUM(total_amount) revenue, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE PULocationID != DOLocationID GROUP BY PULocationID, DOLocationID ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT PULocationID, DOLocationID, COUNT(*) freq, SUM(total_amount) revenue, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE PULocationID != DOLocationID GROUP BY PULocationID, DOLocationID ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT PULocationID, DOLocationID, COUNT(*) freq, SUM(total_amount) revenue, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE PULocationID != DOLocationID GROUP BY PULocationID, DOLocationID ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;
queries.notes: Q3: Standard SQL - identical across all databases.

queries.title: Duration & Speed by Passengers
queries.sql: SELECT passenger_count, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(date_diff('minute', tpep_pickup_datetime, tpep_dropoff_datetime)), 2) duration_mins, ROUND(AVG(trip_distance / NULLIF(date_diff('hour', tpep_pickup_datetime, tpep_dropoff_datetime), 0)), 2) speed_mph FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE passenger_count > 0 AND passenger_count <= 9 GROUP BY passenger_count ORDER BY duration_mins DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT passenger_count, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tpep_dropoff_datetime - tpep_pickup_datetime)) / 60)::numeric, 2) duration_mins, ROUND(AVG(CAST(trip_distance AS numeric) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tpep_dropoff_datetime - tpep_pickup_datetime)) / 3600, 0))::numeric, 2) speed_mph FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE passenger_count > 0 AND passenger_count <= 9 GROUP BY passenger_count ORDER BY duration_mins DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT passenger_count, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG((CAST((julianday(tpep_dropoff_datetime) - julianday(tpep_pickup_datetime)) * 24 * 60 AS REAL))), 2) duration_mins, ROUND(AVG(CAST(trip_distance AS REAL) / NULLIF((julianday(tpep_dropoff_datetime) - julianday(tpep_pickup_datetime)) * 24, 0)), 2) speed_mph FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE passenger_count > 0 AND passenger_count <= 9 GROUP BY passenger_count ORDER BY duration_mins DESC;
queries.clickhouse_sql: SELECT passenger_count, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(dateDiff('minute', tpep_pickup_datetime, tpep_dropoff_datetime)), 2) duration_mins, ROUND(AVG(trip_distance / nullIf(dateDiff('hour', tpep_pickup_datetime, tpep_dropoff_datetime), 0)), 2) speed_mph FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE passenger_count > 0 AND passenger_count <= 9 GROUP BY passenger_count ORDER BY duration_mins DESC;
queries.pg_duckdb_sql: SELECT passenger_count, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tpep_dropoff_datetime - tpep_pickup_datetime)) / 60)::numeric, 2) duration_mins, ROUND(AVG(CAST(trip_distance AS numeric) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tpep_dropoff_datetime - tpep_pickup_datetime)) / 3600, 0))::numeric, 2) speed_mph FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE passenger_count > 0 AND passenger_count <= 9 GROUP BY passenger_count ORDER BY duration_mins DESC;
queries.notes: Q4: Time interval calculations. DuckDB: date_diff(). PG: EXTRACT(EPOCH). SQLite: julianday(). ClickHouse: dateDiff(). pg_duckdb uses PostgreSQL EXTRACT for compatibility.

queries.title: Payment Type & Tips
queries.sql: SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(tip_amount) total_tips, ROUND(SUM(tip_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(fare_amount), 0) * 100, 2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE payment_type IN (1, 2) GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY total_tips DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(tip_amount) total_tips, ROUND(SUM(tip_amount)::numeric / CAST(NULLIF(SUM(fare_amount), 0) AS numeric) * 100, 2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE payment_type IN (1, 2) GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY total_tips DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(tip_amount) total_tips, ROUND(CAST(SUM(tip_amount) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(fare_amount), 0) * 100, 2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE payment_type IN (1, 2) GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY total_tips DESC;
queries.notes: Q5: Aggregation with division. PostgreSQL: ::numeric. SQLite: CAST to REAL.

queries.title: Monthly Revenue Trends
queries.sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime)) SELECT trip_month, revenue, ROUND(AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY trip_month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) rolling_3m FROM monthly ORDER BY trip_month;
queries.postgres_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime)) SELECT trip_month, revenue, ROUND(CAST(AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY trip_month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS numeric), 2) rolling_3m FROM monthly ORDER BY trip_month;
queries.sqlite_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime)) SELECT trip_month, revenue, ROUND(AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY trip_month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) rolling_3m FROM monthly ORDER BY trip_month;
queries.clickhouse_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT CAST(CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) - dayOfMonth(tpep_pickup_datetime) + 1 AS Date) AS trip_month, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY trip_month) SELECT trip_month, revenue, ROUND(AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY trip_month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) rolling_3m FROM monthly ORDER BY trip_month;
queries.notes: Q6: Monthly grouping with window frames. DuckDB/PG: DATE_TRUNC. SQLite: strftime('%Y-%m-01').

queries.title: P90 Distance & Revenue
queries.sql: SELECT VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, COUNT(*) trips, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_distance) p90_dist FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_month DESC LIMIT 100;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, COUNT(*) trips, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_distance) p90_dist FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_month DESC LIMIT 100;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT VendorID, strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(trip_distance) p90_dist FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID, strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_month DESC LIMIT 100;
queries.clickhouse_sql: SELECT VendorID, CAST(CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) - dayOfMonth(tpep_pickup_datetime) + 1 AS Date) AS trip_month, COUNT(*) trips, quantile(0.9)(trip_distance) p90_dist FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID, trip_month ORDER BY trip_month DESC LIMIT 100;
queries.pg_duckdb_sql: SELECT VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) trip_month, COUNT(*) trips, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_distance) p90_dist FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month', tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY trip_month DESC LIMIT 100;
queries.notes: Q7: PERCENTILE_CONT (DuckDB/PG only). SQLite approximates with AVG() and uses strftime(). ClickHouse: quantile(0.9)(). pg_duckdb uses DuckDB syntax.

queries.title: Weekend vs Weekday
queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END day_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END day_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', tpep_pickup_datetime) AS INTEGER) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END day_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', tpep_pickup_datetime) AS INTEGER) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.notes: Q8: Day-of-week extraction. DuckDB/PG: EXTRACT(DOW). SQLite: strftime('%w').

queries.title: Tip Pct by Fare Bins
queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN fare_amount<10 THEN '<$10' WHEN fare_amount<20 THEN '$10-20' ELSE '$20+' END fare_bin, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(tip_amount/NULLIF(fare_amount,0))*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE fare_amount>0 GROUP BY fare_bin ORDER BY tip_pct DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN fare_amount<10 THEN '<$10' WHEN fare_amount<20 THEN '$10-20' ELSE '$20+' END fare_bin, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(CAST(tip_amount AS numeric)/CAST(NULLIF(fare_amount,0) AS numeric))*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE fare_amount>0 GROUP BY fare_bin ORDER BY tip_pct DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN fare_amount<10 THEN '<$10' WHEN fare_amount<20 THEN '$10-20' ELSE '$20+' END fare_bin, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(CAST(tip_amount AS REAL)/NULLIF(fare_amount,0))*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE fare_amount>0 GROUP BY fare_bin ORDER BY tip_pct DESC;
queries.clickhouse_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN fare_amount<10 THEN '<$10' WHEN fare_amount<20 THEN '$10-20' ELSE '$20+' END fare_bin, COUNT(*) trips, ROUND(AVG(tip_amount/nullIf(fare_amount,0))*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE fare_amount>0 GROUP BY fare_bin ORDER BY tip_pct DESC;
queries.notes: Q9: CASE binning with division. PostgreSQL: ::numeric. SQLite: CAST to REAL. ClickHouse: implicit coercion with nullIf().

queries.title: Top Routes
queries.sql: SELECT PULocationID, DOLocationID, COUNT(*) freq, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY PULocationID, DOLocationID ORDER BY freq DESC LIMIT 20;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT PULocationID, DOLocationID, COUNT(*) freq, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY PULocationID, DOLocationID ORDER BY freq DESC LIMIT 20;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT PULocationID, DOLocationID, COUNT(*) freq, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY PULocationID, DOLocationID ORDER BY freq DESC LIMIT 20;
queries.notes: Q10: Standard SQL - identical across databases.

queries.title: Vendor Performance
queries.sql: SELECT VendorID, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(SUM(tip_amount)/NULLIF(SUM(total_amount),0)*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT VendorID, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(SUM(tip_amount)::numeric/CAST(NULLIF(SUM(total_amount),0) AS numeric)*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT VendorID, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(CAST(SUM(tip_amount) AS REAL)/NULLIF(SUM(total_amount),0)*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.clickhouse_sql: SELECT VendorID, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue, ROUND(SUM(tip_amount)/nullIf(SUM(total_amount),0)*100,2) tip_pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY VendorID ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.notes: Q11: Vendor aggregation. PostgreSQL: ::numeric. SQLite: CAST to REAL. ClickHouse: nullIf().

queries.title: Fee Impact
queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN congestion_surcharge>0 THEN 'With Fees' ELSE 'No Fees' END fee_category, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY fee_category ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN congestion_surcharge>0 THEN 'With Fees' ELSE 'No Fees' END fee_category, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY fee_category ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN congestion_surcharge>0 THEN 'With Fees' ELSE 'No Fees' END fee_category, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY fee_category ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.notes: Q12: Fee flag analysis - standard SQL.

queries.title: Revenue Quintiles
queries.sql: WITH tiered AS (SELECT *, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY total_amount) tier FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount>0) SELECT tier, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_amt FROM tiered GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier;
queries.postgres_sql: WITH tiered AS (SELECT *, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY total_amount) tier FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount>0) SELECT tier, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_amt FROM tiered GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier;
queries.sqlite_sql: WITH tiered AS (SELECT *, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY total_amount) tier FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount>0) SELECT tier, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_amt FROM tiered GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier;
queries.notes: Q13: NTILE window (DuckDB/PG/SQLite 3.30+).

queries.title: Heatmap 24x7
queries.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) hr, EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) dow, COUNT(*) trips FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime), EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY dow, hr;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime)::integer hr, EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime)::integer dow, COUNT(*) trips FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM tpep_pickup_datetime), EXTRACT(DOW FROM tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY dow, hr;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%H',tpep_pickup_datetime) AS INTEGER) hr, CAST(strftime('%w',tpep_pickup_datetime) AS INTEGER) dow, COUNT(*) trips FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY strftime('%H',tpep_pickup_datetime), strftime('%w',tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY dow, hr;
queries.notes: Q14: 2D grouping by hour and day. SQLite uses strftime().

queries.title: Airport Trips
queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN airport_fee>0 THEN 'Airport' ELSE 'Regular' END trip_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY trip_type ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN airport_fee>0 THEN 'Airport' ELSE 'Regular' END trip_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY trip_type ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN airport_fee>0 THEN 'Airport' ELSE 'Regular' END trip_type, COUNT(*) trips, SUM(total_amount) revenue FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY trip_type ORDER BY revenue DESC;
queries.notes: Q15: Airport flag analysis - standard SQL.

queries.title: Rate Codes
queries.sql: SELECT RatecodeID, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE RatecodeID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RatecodeID ORDER BY trips DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT RatecodeID, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE RatecodeID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RatecodeID ORDER BY trips DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT RatecodeID, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE RatecodeID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY RatecodeID ORDER BY trips DESC;
queries.notes: Q16: Rate code analysis - standard SQL.

queries.title: Month-over-Month Change
queries.sql: WITH mon AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime) mo, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime)) SELECT mo, rev, ROUND((rev-LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo))/NULLIF(LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo),0)*100,2) pct_chg FROM mon ORDER BY mo;
queries.postgres_sql: WITH mon AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime) mo, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime)) SELECT mo, rev, ROUND(CAST((rev-LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo)) AS numeric)/CAST(NULLIF(LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo),0) AS numeric)*100,2) pct_chg FROM mon ORDER BY mo;
queries.sqlite_sql: WITH mon AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime) mo, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime)) SELECT mo, rev, ROUND(CAST((rev-LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo)) AS REAL)/NULLIF(LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo),0)*100,2) pct_chg FROM mon ORDER BY mo;
queries.clickhouse_sql: WITH mon AS (SELECT CAST(CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) - dayOfMonth(tpep_pickup_datetime) + 1 AS Date) AS mo, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY mo) SELECT mo, rev, ROUND((rev-LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo))/nullIf(LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY mo),0)*100,2) pct_chg FROM mon ORDER BY mo;
queries.notes: Q17: MoM with LAG. PostgreSQL: ::numeric. SQLite: strftime() and CAST to REAL. ClickHouse: toStartOfMonth() and nullIf().

queries.title: Revenue per Mile
queries.sql: SELECT VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime) mo, ROUND(SUM(total_amount)/NULLIF(SUM(trip_distance),0),2) rpm FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE trip_distance>0 GROUP BY VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY mo DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: SELECT VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime) mo, ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric/CAST(NULLIF(SUM(trip_distance),0) AS numeric),2) rpm FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE trip_distance>0 GROUP BY VendorID, DATE_TRUNC('month',tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY mo DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: SELECT VendorID, strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime) mo, ROUND(CAST(SUM(total_amount) AS REAL)/NULLIF(SUM(trip_distance),0),2) rpm FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE trip_distance>0 GROUP BY VendorID, strftime('%Y-%m-01', tpep_pickup_datetime) ORDER BY mo DESC;
queries.clickhouse_sql: SELECT VendorID, CAST(CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) - dayOfMonth(tpep_pickup_datetime) + 1 AS Date) AS mo, ROUND(SUM(total_amount)/nullIf(SUM(trip_distance),0),2) rpm FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE trip_distance>0 GROUP BY VendorID, mo ORDER BY mo DESC;
queries.notes: Q18: Efficiency metric. PostgreSQL: ::numeric. SQLite: strftime() and CAST to REAL. ClickHouse: toStartOfMonth() and nullIf().

queries.title: Cumulative Revenue
queries.sql: WITH daily AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) dt, VendorID, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT dt, VendorID, rev, ROUND(SUM(rev) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY dt),2) cumul FROM daily ORDER BY VendorID, dt;
queries.postgres_sql: WITH daily AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) dt, VendorID, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT dt, VendorID, rev, ROUND(CAST(SUM(rev) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY dt) AS numeric),2) cumul FROM daily ORDER BY VendorID, dt;
queries.sqlite_sql: WITH daily AS (SELECT DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime) dt, VendorID, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY DATE(tpep_pickup_datetime), VendorID) SELECT dt, VendorID, rev, ROUND(SUM(rev) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY dt),2) cumul FROM daily ORDER BY VendorID, dt;
queries.clickhouse_sql: WITH daily AS (SELECT CAST(tpep_pickup_datetime AS Date) AS dt, VendorID, SUM(total_amount) rev FROM yellow_taxi_trips GROUP BY dt, VendorID) SELECT dt, VendorID, rev, ROUND(SUM(rev) OVER (PARTITION BY VendorID ORDER BY dt),2) cumul FROM daily ORDER BY VendorID, dt;
queries.notes: Q19: Running window frame. PostgreSQL: ::numeric. ClickHouse: toDate().

queries.title: Top 5% vs Rest
queries.sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_amount DESC) pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount>0) SELECT CASE WHEN pct<=0.05 THEN 'Top 5%' ELSE 'Rest' END tier, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM ranked GROUP BY CASE WHEN pct<=0.05 THEN 'Top 5%' ELSE 'Rest' END ORDER BY avg_fare DESC;
queries.postgres_sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_amount DESC) pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount>0) SELECT CASE WHEN pct<=0.05 THEN 'Top 5%' ELSE 'Rest' END tier, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM ranked GROUP BY CASE WHEN pct<=0.05 THEN 'Top 5%' ELSE 'Rest' END ORDER BY avg_fare DESC;
queries.sqlite_sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_amount DESC) pct FROM yellow_taxi_trips WHERE total_amount>0) SELECT CASE WHEN pct<=0.05 THEN 'Top 5%' ELSE 'Rest' END tier, COUNT(*) trips, AVG(total_amount) avg_fare FROM ranked GROUP BY CASE WHEN pct<=0.05 THEN 'Top 5%' ELSE 'Rest' END ORDER BY avg_fare DESC;
queries.notes: Q20: PERCENT_RANK window (DuckDB/PG/SQLite 3.30+).
